title: Peruvian Corn Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with a sweet corn and floral mixture. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine corn, hash, and floral honey. Mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk together gluten-free flour and a pinch of salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the corn mixture and stir until just combined.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the corn mixture into the oil.
Fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
